zh.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Crewe於1270年之前出生在英國爾南特維其時，她的父親Thomas Crewe29歲，母親Avice25歲。她和Richard de Praers至少有5個兒子。她去世於1330年在英國爾巴堂姆利。

zh-hans.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Crewe于1270年之前出生在英国爾南特維其时，她的父亲Thomas Crewe29岁，母亲Avice25岁。她和Richard de Praers至少有5个儿子。她去世于1330年在英国爾巴堂姆利。

nameMeanings.name: Crewe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crew
meanings: English: habitational name from Crewe in Cheshire or Crew in Cumberland, both named with Old Welsh criu ‘weir’. This denoted a wickerwork fence that was stretched across a river to catch fish.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Crewe was born before 1270, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, her father, Thomas Crewe, was 29 and her mother, Avice, was 25. She had at least 5 sons with Richard de Praers. She died in 1330, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Crewe est née avant 1270, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Crewe, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Avice, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils avec Richard de Praers. Elle est décédée en 1330, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Crewe vor 1270 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Crewe 29 und ihre Mutter Avice 25. Sie hatte mit Richard de Praers mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1330 in Barthomley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Crewe è nata il prima del 1270 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Crewe, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Avice, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli con Richard de Praers. Morì nel 1330, nel Barthomley, Cheshire, England.

ja.Nantwich, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチ
ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Creweが1270年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父Thomas Creweは29歳，母Aviceは25歳であった。彼女はRichard de Praersとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1330年にイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Crewe(이)가 1270년 이전 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Crewe(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Richard de Praers(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 영국 체실르 바톰리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Crewe nasceu antes 1270, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Crewe, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Avice, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Richard de Praers. Ela faleceu em 1330, em Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Crewe родилась перед 1270 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Crewe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Richard de Praers. Она умерла в 1330 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Crewe nació antes de 1270, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Crewe, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Avice, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Richard de Praers. Murió en 1330, en Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
